The '''''Peremptory''''' was an [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] that served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
In [[8 ABY/Legends|8.5 ABY]] the vessel saw action at the [[Battle of Storinal]], where it captured the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] Star Destroyer ''[[Rebel Dream]]''.

In [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], upon hearing that [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] forces had arrived at the site of the [[Katana fleet]], [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] dispatched the ''Peremptory'' to assist the Imperial Star Destroyer [[Judicator/Legends|''Judicator'']] in completing the capture of the few remaining [[Katana fleet]] [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|Dreadnaughts]]. Under Thrawn's command, Imperial forces had already captured most of the legendary fleet's derelict warships for the Empire.

During this [[Battle for the Katana fleet]], the ''Peremptory'' was destroyed after New Republic agents, most notably [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], deliberately rammed a slave-rigged [[Katana fleet|''Katana'' fleet]] [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|Dreadnaught]] into the vessel. Despite attempts by the ship's captain to take evasive action in order to avoid a collision, the Star Destroyer's bridge superstructure was rammed after its [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector shields]] had been considerably weakened as a result of an [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]] barrage executed by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]]' warships. The ''Peremptory'' was lost with all hands.

Later, Captain [[Brandei]] of the Imperial Star Destroyer [[Judicator/Legends|''Judicator'']] vowed to himself that he would avenge the loss of the ''Peremptory''. Brandei was personally rebuked by [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] Thrawn, who reminded the senior officer that New Republic forces would eventually face the consequences for their destruction of the ''Peremptory'', and it was not his responsibility to enact personal revenge.
